tasks.subject: Batch1-Task 1: wallet 格子:ledger 迁入 + WalletBalanceApi
tasks.description:
**Goal:** com.gabon.ledger 迁至 com.gabon.wallet.internal.ledger,新建 wallet.api.WalletBalanceApi,feed 改依赖 api,连带更新 codegen 配置与既有 ArchUnit 钱核规则。

**Files:**
- Create: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/wallet/api/WalletBalanceApi.kt
- Move+Modify: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/ledger/{AccountKind,LedgerService}.kt → src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/wallet/internal/ledger/
- Modify: src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/feed/FeedOrchestrator.kt、build.gradle.kts:126-127、src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/ArchitectureTest.kt:50、测试 import ×3

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- com.gabon.ledger 包不复存在
- FeedOrchestrator 只 import wallet.api
- 钱核禁协程规则覆盖 ..wallet../..recharge../..withdraw..
- ./gradlew check 全绿

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "standard", "files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/wallet/api/WalletBalanceApi.kt", "build.gradle.kts", "src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/ArchitectureTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ledger package relocated under wallet/internal", "feed depends on wallet.api only", "money-core rule covers wallet/recharge/withdraw", "gradlew check green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Batch1-Task 2: outbox → platform、feed → content
tasks.description:
**Goal:** OutboxRepo 迁入 platform.outbox,FeedOrchestrator 迁入 content.internal.feed,测试 import 跟进。

**Files:**
- Move+Modify: OutboxRepo.kt → platform/outbox/;FeedOrchestrator.kt → content/internal/feed/
- Modify: OutboxLeaseTest、CoroutineBoundaryTest import

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- com.gabon.outbox、com.gabon.feed 包不复存在
- feed 无事务规则仍生效(..feed.. 匹配新路径)
- ./gradlew check 全绿

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "mechanical", "files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/platform/outbox/OutboxRepo.kt", "src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/content/internal/feed/FeedOrchestrator.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["old packages gone", "feed rule still matches", "gradlew check green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Batch1-Task 3: 九上下文 marker 类
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 空格子放真实 marker 类,九上下文 api/internal 包 classpath 可见。

**Files:**
- Create: 8 api marker(identity/recharge/withdraw/reward/content/media/moderation/reporting)+ 7 internal marker(同上除 content;wallet/content 已有真实类的包不需要)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 九上下文 api/internal 包均含编译产物类
- ./gradlew check 全绿

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "mechanical", "files": ["src/main/kotlin/com/gabon/"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["15 marker files exactly per list", "gradlew check green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Batch1-Task 4: ModuleBoundaryTest(规则 1-4 + 表所有权)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 表驱动边界断言:两两 internal 禁入、方向白名单、platform 不反向依赖、表所有权白名单(无主表失败);负向探针验证后 revert。完整代码在计划文档 Task 4。

**Files:**
- Create: src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/ModuleBoundaryTest.kt

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- spec §4 规则 1/2/3/4/6 全部有断言
- 完整性断言:com.gabon.jooq.tables 每个顶层表类都在 TABLE_OWNER 登记,导入为空失败(防空过)
- 负向探针证明 tables.references.ACCOUNT 形式被拦;未拦住则扩展检测,禁止提交空过规则
- ./gradlew check 全绿

**Verify:** ./gradlew check → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "standard", "files": ["src/test/kotlin/com/gabon/ModuleBoundaryTest.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rules 1-4 and 6 asserted", "table owner completeness assertion independent of references", "negative probe proves references form is caught", "gradlew check green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Batch1-Task 5: 文档同步(B4 决策注记 + CLAUDE.md)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 方案 A 决策注记进架构文档 B4;CLAUDE.md 硬规则包名、模块边界条目、目录结构对齐九格子。完整文本在计划文档 Task 5。

**Files:**
- Modify: docs/architecture-redesign.md、CLAUDE.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- B4 含方案 A 决策注记(用户定稿措辞)
- CLAUDE.md 含模块边界/表所有权硬规则,目录结构更新
- git diff --stat 仅 2 个 md

**Verify:** git diff --stat 仅 2 个 md;通读改动

```json:metadata
{"modelTier": "mechanical", "files": ["docs/architecture-redesign.md", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "git diff --stat", "acceptanceCriteria": ["B4 decision note added", "CLAUDE.md grid and hard rules updated", "only two md files changed"]}
```
